fields.title: Migrate task/ feature
fields.description:
Move task extension to tau/src/task/

## Source files
- extensions/task/src/index.ts
- extensions/task/src/runner.ts
- extensions/task/src/sessions.ts
- extensions/task/src/registry.ts
- extensions/task/src/skills.ts
- extensions/task/src/render.ts
- extensions/task/src/types.ts
- extensions/task/skills/ (bundled skill files)

## Target
- extensions/tau/src/task/index.ts
- extensions/tau/src/task/runner.ts
- extensions/tau/src/task/sessions.ts
- extensions/tau/src/task/registry.ts
- extensions/tau/src/task/skills.ts
- extensions/tau/src/task/render.ts
- extensions/tau/src/task/types.ts
- extensions/tau/skills/ (move bundled skills)

## Changes
- Export initTask(pi, state) function
- Access sandbox config via state.sandbox (for future sandboxed workers)
- Keep tool name 'task'
- Dependencies (ajv, ajv-formats) in root package.json

## DoD
- task tool works with all task types
- Worker spawning works
- Bundled skills load correctly
- Custom TUI rendering works
fields.close_reason: Copied task extension into tau/src/task (initTask) and moved bundled skills to extensions/tau/skills
